ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., active, retired, draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the course was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the course */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lessons" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the lesson belongs to */,
  "lesson_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lesson within the course */,
  "lesson_name" TEXT /* Name of the lesson */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page or section within the course material */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the lesson */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lesson (e.g., active, retired, draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the lesson was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the lesson was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the lesson */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the lesson */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the lesson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson the media item is associated with */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., video, slides, notebook) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media item */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the media item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media item (e.g., active, retired, draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the media item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the media item was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the media item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the media item */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user is enrolled in */,
  "enrolled_at" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the course */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the user completed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lesson_completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the lesson */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson the user completed */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the user completed the lesson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_completions_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_completions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content (course, lesson, media) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., course, lesson, media) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "version_url" TEXT /* URL to the versioned content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the collaboration is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the user joined the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
